evidence.claim: Designed hybrid retrieval system (BM25 + dense vector) serving 50M+ queries/month
evidence.source_text: designed the company's first hybrid retrieval system combining BM25 with dense vector recall, serving 50M+ queries per month.

evidence.claim: Used Pinecone, BGE-large, XGBoost, and behavioral-signal integration for ranking pipelines
evidence.source_text: candidate sourcing → embedding generation (using a fine-tuned BGE-large) → Pinecone retrieval → learning-to-rank re-scoring (XGBoost) → behavioral-signal integration.

evidence.claim: Developed calibration approach using simulated A/B tests stable for 18 months
evidence.source_text: we landed on a calibration approach using simulated A/B tests that has held up over the last 18 months.

evidence.claim: Led migration from keyword to embedding-based search for 30M+ corpus
evidence.source_text: Led the migration from keyword-based to embedding-based search across a 30M+ candidate corpus over 8 months.

evidence.claim: Improved recruiter engagement by 24% and reduced time-to-shortlist by 38%
evidence.source_text: The final embedding ranker improved recruiter engagement metrics by 24% and reduced the average time-to-shortlist by 38%.

evidence.claim: Mentored two junior engineers through search migration rollout
evidence.source_text: Mentored two junior engineers through this rollout.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation metrics and infrastructure reliability (index/embedding versioning, rollback paths)
evidence.source_text: Most of the engineering effort went into the boring infrastructure: index versioning, embedding versioning, rollback paths, and the dashboards that let recruiters trust the new system.

evidence.claim: Proficient in Python, TensorFlow, Elasticsearch, pgvector, and NLP
Experience with LoRA, QLoRA, and Prompt Engineering
